scope: TileLang sparse-MLA compressed dKV backward, slab-free P/dP recompute plus in-producer compressed-group reduction

implemented.new_metadata: build_chunk_compact_slots() creates selected-K-chunk active compressed-group tables and pair slots
implemented.contract: consume real q/dO/output/lse/compressed_kv plus packed group ids, recompute P and scaled dP inside TileLang, reduce by compressed group before final [groups, D] dKV atomic writes

correctness_gate.read: The kernel is mechanically correct in the expected BF16 recompute band on S512 and is faster than the previous legal full-panel grouped-D S512 gate.

s4096_results.read: Best retained S4096 chunked-grouped fused recompute point in this sweep.
Compile-safe row-block fallback is rejected; it destroys reuse and explodes CTA count.

compile_failures.shape: S4096 gp512/cap512 K64 D32x2 and D32x1
compile_failures.failure: TileLang layout inference: no available layout found
compile_failures.read: Full 512-wide panel chunks still have max chunk active groups up to 471 and are too irregular/large for the grouped-table lowering.

compile_failures.failure: TileLang MFMA layout inference divide by zero
compile_failures.read: D16 tile is not usable in this TileLang/MFMA lowering path.

compile_failures.failure: requested dynamic shared memory 172032 exceeds device limit 163840
compile_failures.read: D64x4 is just over the MI350 shared-memory limit; D32x8 remains the best legal high-reuse point.

decision.retained_positive: The TileLang chunked grouped kernel is real, correctness-passing at S512, and improves the best legal slab-free S4096 grouped-D attempt from 61.64 ms to 42.85 ms.
decision.blocker: At S4096, useful no-slab P/dP reuse still requires either too much TileLang reduction state or too many chunk-group CTAs/atomics. Even the best legal D32x8 point is 6.2x slower than the materialized-input selected-limit dKV producer and already far above the sparse-attention backward budget.
decision.next: Keep the materialized-input selected-limit TileLang producer as the current dKV output candidate. For slab-free production, move the fused P/dP plus compressed dKV reducer to a lower-level HIP/CK/rocWMMA path or find a TileLang primitive that supports a persistent grouped accumulator without full active-row materialization.
